October 2024 K. Schneider Clarified meaning of 0 value in HMO_IND_01–12; clarified meaning 
of first digit in PTC_CNTRCT_ID_01–12 1.7 

February 2024 K. Schneider Added clarity re: derivation of ESRD_IND and a comment for 
DUAL_STUS_CD_01–12 1.6 

April 2023 K. Schneider Added values and corresponding descriptions for 
ENTLMT_RSN_CURR and MDCR_STATUS_CD; added a comment for 
STATE_CODE and adjusted description for value 55
